name: Swiss Steak
recipeIngredient: 2 lbs beef round steak, cut into 1-inch thick slices
recipeInstructions:
1. In a shallow dish, combine the flour, salt, and pepper.
2. Sprinkle half of the seasoned flour mixture on one side of each steak slice.
3. Pound the steaks with a meat mallet until they are an even 1-inch thick.
4. Turn the steaks over and sprinkle the remaining seasoned flour mixture on them.
5. In a large skillet, melt the vegetable oil over medium heat.
6. Brown the steaks in the skillet for about 15 minutes, turning occasionally, until browned on all sides.
7. Cover the skillet and reduce the heat to low. Simmer for 1 hour, adding water if necessary to keep the pan moist.
8. Mix together the canned tomatoes, onions, and green pepper.
9. Pour the tomato mixture over the steaks in the skillet.
10. Cover the skillet and continue simmering for an additional 30 minutes, or until the steak is tender.
